primary_sources.name: KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Hemodialysis Adequacy: 2015 Update
primary_sources.relevance: Defines key dialysis technical terms including dialysate, ultrafiltration, and adequacy measures

primary_sources.name: KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Vascular Access: 2019 Update
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative definitions for access recirculation and vascular access terminology

primary_sources.name: Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Regulatory definitions for dialysis operations including dry weight and treatment parameters

primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive technical definitions for dialyzer membranes and dialysis equipment terminology

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases Dialysis Terminology Review
secondary_sources.relevance: Recent updates on standardized dialysis terminology and technical definitions

gaps: Limited recent updates to standardized technical terminology definitions
Emerging membrane technology terms may not be covered in older guidelines
